aeo_readiness.summary: Green Air Care has a basic foundation for AEO but lacks critical elements to maximize visibility and engagement.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build a Google Business Profile with positive reviews.
Expand and optimize website content for long-tail keywords related to HVAC and plumbing services.
Enhance local SEO by creating dedicated location-based service pages.

gbp_analysis.summary: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) was detected. This is a significant gap in local search visibility.
critical_issues: Missing GBP means the business is invisible in Google Maps and local search packs.
Lack of GBP prevents customer reviews, which are crucial for trust and local ranking.
No opportunity to leverage GBP features like Q&A, posts, and service listings.

nap_citations.summary: Inconsistent or missing Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across local directories.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across major directories like Yelp, Bing, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across the website and all online platforms.
Claim and verify the business on relevant local directories to improve local SEO.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of GBP and local SEO optimization
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers using Google Maps
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP and generating customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing high-quality, locally-focused content and earning backlinks from local organizations
